basic_details.job_title: BITS Pilani Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Birla Institute of Technology & Science, Pilani (BITS Pilani)
basic_details.short_information: Birla Institute of Technology & Science, Pilani (BITS Pilani) has released the official Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Notification 2026 under Advt. No. ANRF/ECRG/2025/003251/LS. A vacancy has been announced under the BITS Pilani JRF Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates with a Post Graduate Degree in Basic Science or a Graduate/Post Graduate Degree in a Professional Course qualified through CSIR-UGC NET, GATE, or other recognized national-level examinations are eligible to apply. Interested candidates can submit their applications via email on or before 31 July 2026. The official notification P

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: No specific age limit is mentioned in the official notification.

qualification.education_qualification: Post Graduate Degree in Basic Science OR Graduate/Post Graduate in Degree in Professional Course selected through National Eligibility Tests- CSIR –UGC NET including lectureship (Assistant Professorship) and GATE, or through National level examinations conducted by Central Government departments and their agencies and Institutions such as DST, DBT, DAE, DOS, DRDO, MHRD, ICAR, IIT, IISc, IISER etc.
qualification.details: Post Graduate Degree in Basic Science OR Graduate/Post Graduate in Degree in Professional Course selected through any one of the following:- Scholars who are selected through National Eligibility Tests- CSIR –UGC NET including lectureship (Assistant Professorship) and GATE. The Selection process through National level examinations conducted by Central Government departments and their agencies and Institutions such as DST, DBT, DAE, DOS, DRDO, MHRD, ICAR, IIT, IISc, IISER etc.

selection_process: Selection through National Eligibility Tests- CSIR –UGC NET including lectureship (Assistant Professorship) and GATE. Selection process through National level examinations conducted by Central Government departments and their agencies and Institutions such as DST
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for BITS Pilani Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 31-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for BITS Pilani Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 31-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: BITS Pilani Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the BITS Pilani JRF recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to apply for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position at BITS Pilani is July 31, 2026. Candidates are strongly advised to submit their applications well before this deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the eligibility criteria for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) post?
faq.answer: To be eligible, candidates must possess a Post Graduate Degree in Basic Science OR a Graduate/Post Graduate Degree in a Professional Course. Selection must be through national-level tests like CSIR-UGC NET or GATE, or other central government examinations.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the JRF position?
faq.answer: The selected Junior Research Fellow will receive a stipend of Rs. 37,000 plus House Rent Allowance (HRA). This amounts to a total of Rs. 44,400 per month (Rs. 37,000 + Rs. 7,400 HRA).

faq.question: Q4. How can I apply for the BITS Pilani JRF position?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. Interested candidates need to send their application and curriculum vitae with research experience details to the specified Principal Investigator's email address.

faq.question: Q5. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this Junior Research Fellow (JRF) recruitment at BITS Pilani is ANRF/ECRG/2025/003251/LS.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this post?
faq.answer: The official notification does not mention any specific application fee for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position. Therefore, it is likely that there is no fee required to apply.

faq.question: Q7. What is the job type for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position at BITS Pilani is a project-based role, meaning it is associated with a specific research project.

faq.question: Q8. What is the location of the BITS Pilani campus for this recruitment?
faq.answer: This recruitment is for the BITS Pilani, K. K. Birla Goa Campus, located in Goa.

faq.question: Q9. What are the selection methods for the JRF post?
faq.answer: Selection will be based on performance in national eligibility tests like CSIR-UGC NET or GATE, or other national-level examinations, followed by an online or personal interview.

faq.question: Q10. Does BITS Pilani offer any age relaxation for JRF posts?
faq.answer: The official notification does not specify any age limits or age relaxation details for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position. Candidates are advised to check the detailed notification for any such information.
